creator: gja822@narod.ru
text:
Well, as can see, the problem may reside not in gdk-pixbuf2 itself, since its source was not upgraded for a while, was it?
But also I've rebuilt all ports' dependencies, without luck. Also tried with different compiler (clang12). May be some change in infrastructure. Hard to trace the problem for me.
But I've left without Gnome2 (MATE exactly) graphical environment for now.
